privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content:
Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy is provided by Pest – Free (Owner: Christos Pamporis), Greece ("we", "us", "our").

We aim to comply with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Greek data protection law.

1. Data Controller
Data Controller: Pest – Free (Christos Pamporis), Greece
Contact email: manager@pestify.gr

2. Scope
This Privacy Policy covers:

Marketing website: pestify.gr (information pages, contact form, demo request)
Application platform: app.pestify.gr and Pestify mobile apps (iOS/Android)
Note: The "Login" button on pestify.gr only redirects you to app.pestify.gr. No authentication occurs on pestify.gr.

3. Marketing Website (pestify.gr)

3.1 Data we collect
We collect personal data only when you voluntarily submit it:

Contact form: name, email, company, team size, message
Demo booking (Calendly): name and email (as requested by Calendly)

3.2 Purpose
We use this information strictly to:

Respond to your request
Communicate with you about a demo you requested
Schedule the demo

3.3 What we do not do
We do not sell personal data
We do not use your data for advertising, remarketing, or profiling
We do not run transactions or process payments on pestify.gr
We do not create a marketing database for newsletters without your explicit consent

3.4 Legal basis
We process this data under GDPR Article 6(1)(b) (steps prior to entering into a contract, at your request) and/or Article 6(1)(f) (legitimate interest in responding to business inquiries).

3.5 Retention
We retain inquiry and demo-related communications only for as long as necessary to respond and follow up on your request, and then delete them when no longer needed, unless legal obligations require longer retention.

3.6 Calendly
If you request a demo using Calendly, your booking details may be processed by Calendly. Calendly may act as an independent data controller for certain processing activities according to its own privacy policy. We recommend reviewing Calendly's privacy information before submitting data through the Calendly interface.

4. Application Platform (app.pestify.gr & Mobile Apps)

4.1 Data processed in the application
When the application is used, the platform may process and store data such as:

Account data: customer/user name, username, email
Service locations: address of the location where pest control services are performed
Operational data: service logs, reports, performance indicators (used only inside the app)
Technician data: technician name and age (used only for internal operational management)
Images (admin-only): admin uploads images created by the admin (top-view diagrams of buildings / locations)
No payment data is processed. No transactions take place through the platform.

4.2 Roles under GDPR (Controller / Processor)
When pest control companies use Pestify and upload personal data of private individuals (e.g., homeowner names), the pest control company is typically the Data Controller and Data Processor for that customer's data, processing it only to provide the service.

Where Pestify acts as a Data Processor on behalf of a business customer, requests regarding personal data (e.g., access, deletion) should primarily be directed to the relevant business acting as Data Controller. Pestify will assist the Controller as required under GDPR Article 28.

4.3 Legal basis
For platform account operation and service delivery, processing is generally based on GDPR Article 6(1)(b) (performance of a contract) and GDPR Article 28 (processing on behalf of a a controller, where applicable).

4.4 Security
Passwords are stored using hashing (not plaintext)
Role-based access controls (e.g., admin-only uploads)
HTTPS encryption in transit

4.5 Retention
Application data is retained for the duration of the contractual relationship with the business customer and is deleted upon account termination or upon instruction from the business customer, unless legal obligations require longer retention.

5. Hosting & Infrastructure

5.1 Marketing website hosting
The website pestify.gr is hosted by Papaki (Top.Host). Papaki may process limited technical data (e.g., IP addresses) as part of standard hosting operations.

5.2 Application backend hosting
The application backend is hosted on Railway and data is stored in PostgreSQL (PSQL).

6. Sharing of Data
We do not sell, rent, or trade personal data.

Data may be processed only by:

Our hosting/infrastructure providers (Papaki for the website; Railway for the backend and database)
Calendly (for demo scheduling, when you use the demo booking feature)
Authorized personnel, solely for support and operations

7. International Transfers
Where any service provider involved in processing transfers personal data outside the European Economic Area (EEA), appropriate safeguards (such as Standard Contractual Clauses) will be used where required in accordance with GDPR Chapter V.

8. Cookies
At the time of this policy, pestify.gr does not use analytics or marketing cookies. If analytics/advertising tools are enabled in the future, they will be activated only with user consent where required, and this policy will be updated.

The application may use strictly necessary cookies (or similar technologies) for secure authentication and session management.

For more information, see our Cookie Settings.

9. Your Rights and Supervisory Authority
Depending on the circumstances, you may have rights including:

Right of access
Right to rectification
Right to erasure
Right to restriction of processing
Right to object
Right to data portability
Right to withdraw consent (where processing is based on consent)
To exercise your rights, contact: manager@pestify.gr

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. For Greece, the supervisory authority is

Hellenic Data Protection Authority (HDPA)
Address: Kifisias 1-3
115 23 Athens
Greece
Website: https://www.dpa.gr
Telephone: +30 210 6475600

10. Changes to this Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our services or legal requirements. We will publish the updated version on this page with a revised date.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.content:
Terms of Use

Effective Date: 23/02/2026
Last Updated: 23/02/2026

These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of:

pestify.gr (marketing website), and
app.pestify.gr and related mobile applications (the "Platform"),
operated by:

Pest – Free
Owner: Christos Pamporis (Χρήστος Παμπόρης)
Greece

By accessing or using Pestify, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

If you do not agree, you must not use the services.

1. Scope of the Services
Pestify is a digital software platform designed for pest control businesses to:

Manage customer data
Organize service schedules
Maintain service logs and documentation
Generate structured compliance reports
Improve operational workflows
The marketing website (pestify.gr) is informational only and does not provide pest control services.

2. Eligibility
The Platform is intended primarily for business users (B2B).

By using the Platform, you confirm that:

You are acting on behalf of a business entity, or
You are legally authorized to bind the business you represent
If you are a consumer within the meaning of EU consumer law, certain mandatory consumer protections may apply.

3. Account Registration
To access the Platform, you may need to create an account.

You agree to:

Provide accurate and complete information
Maintain confidentiality of login credentials
Be responsible for all activities under your account
You must notify us immediately of unauthorized use.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts in case of breach.

4. Subscription & Payments
If paid plans are offered:

Subscription fees are stated on the Pricing page.
Fees are exclusive of VAT unless stated otherwise.
Payment terms will be specified at checkout.
Failure to pay may result in suspension.
Free trials, if offered, convert to paid subscriptions unless cancelled before expiration.

5. Acceptable Use
You agree NOT to:

Use the Platform for unlawful purposes
Upload illegal or harmful content
Interfere with system security
Reverse engineer, copy, or exploit the software
Use the Platform to process data without legal basis under GDPR
You are solely responsible for the legality of the data you upload.

6. Intellectual Property
All intellectual property rights in:

Software
Code
Design
Branding
Documentation
Logos
are owned by Pest – Free unless otherwise stated.

You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Platform for internal business purposes only.

You may not:

Resell the Platform
Modify or redistribute it
Create derivative works

7. Data Protection (GDPR Roles)

7.1 Marketing Website
For pestify.gr, Pest – Free acts as Data Controller as described in the Privacy Policy.

7.2 Application Platform
When business customers upload personal data (e.g., homeowner names):

The pest control company is the Data Controller
Pestify acts as a Data Processor under Article 28 GDPR
We process data solely:

On documented instructions from the business customer
To provide the contracted service
Requests from individuals (data subjects) should primarily be directed to the business acting as Controller.

A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) may apply where required by law.

8. Availability of Service
We aim to provide continuous access but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.

The Platform may be temporarily unavailable due to:

Maintenance
Security updates
Technical failures
Force majeure events
We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features.

9. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted under Greek and EU law:

The Platform is provided "as is".
We do not guarantee error-free or uninterrupted service.
We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the customer in the preceding 12 months.
Nothing in these Terms excludes liability for:

Death or personal injury caused by negligence
Fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation
Any liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law

10. No Professional Advice
Pestify is a software tool.

It does not provide:

Legal advice
Regulatory advice
Pest control services
Certification guarantees
Users remain fully responsible for regulatory compliance in their jurisdiction.

11. Termination
We may suspend or terminate access if:

You breach these Terms
You fail to pay subscription fees
Use poses security risks
Required by law
You may terminate your account at any time.

Upon termination:

Access is revoked
Data may be deleted according to the Privacy Policy

12. Third-Party Services
The Platform may integrate third-party services such as:

Hosting providers
Calendly (demo booking)
Infrastructure services
We are not responsible for third-party policies or performance.

13. Confidentiality
Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of non-public business information.

This obligation survives termination.

14. Force Majeure
We are not liable for failure to perform due to events beyond reasonable control, including:

Natural disasters
War
Government actions
Internet failures
Power outages

15. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
These Terms are governed by the laws of Greece.

Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Greece, unless mandatory EU consumer law provides otherwise.

16. Amendments
We may update these Terms.

Updated versions will be published on this page with a revised date.

Continued use constitutes acceptance.

17. Contact
For legal inquiries:

manager@pestify.gr
